title: allow WebFetch(domain:example.com) は当該ドメイン取得を事前承認 -> ALLOW (陽性対照)

probes.prompt: First use the WebFetch tool to fetch https://example.com. If (and only if) that fetch returns page content, then use the Write tool to create a file at $REPO/cases/P10-webfetch-rules/c-allow-match/WF_MARKER.txt with the content 'FETCHED'. If the WebFetch call is blocked or denied, do NOT write any file — just reply WF_BLOCKED. Use only the WebFetch and Write tools.

hypothesis: allow WebFetch(domain:example.com) は example.com の WebFetch 取得を事前承認する。fetch 成功→Write マーカー生成=ALLOWED。deny(a)・no-match(b)との対で domain allowlist の陽性側を確定。
